name: GitHub - Repository Analysis
description: Analyze GitHub repositories for popular users including stats and language breakdown

config.sql:
SELECT 
  username,
  repo_type,
  'https://api.github.com/users/' || username as user_info_url,
  'https://api.github.com/users/' || username || '/repos?sort=updated&per_page=100' as repos_url,
  'https://api.github.com/users/' || username || '/repos?sort=pushed&direction=desc' as recently_pushed_url,
  'GET' as method,
  'application/vnd.github.v3+json' as accept_header
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY username

SELECT 
  username,
  repo_type,
  user_info_url,
  repos_url,
  recently_pushed_url,
  method,
  accept_header,
  '60 requests/hour unauthenticated | 5000/hour authenticated' as rate_limit_info
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY username
